title: Encaged
body:
# Archived Not active! Wont Work!
<details>
<summary>Don't read (spoilers)</summary>

# Encaged
_Have you ever wanted to cage yourself inside minecraft? No? Well this does just that!_

## Features!!!
- Disabled quit game button
- Disabled closing out the game
- Disabled disconnect button
- Replace title screen with instantly joining a server specified in the config (default encaged.skye.host)
- Config menu to optionally change everything above

## Why?
- Sometimes you just don't want to stop playing minecraft
- I got bored one day
- Why not?
- 
## Server Host
- The server is hosted by @[NobleSkye](https://modrinth.com/user/NobleSkye) She has some great projects! Check her out!
- want to play without  the mod installed?
join the server at `encaged.skye.host`!
</details>

Server end of support 09/29/2024 - Skye

join play.skyemc.net if you want to play on a server thats up and not locked
https://discord.gg/rhCkxTMXsF
